title: Public Market Symbol Snapshot
description: One-shot selected-symbol row view. The row source is mode-dependent: live responses project the selected row from the latest internal PublishedState (last-good) — a RefreshSymbolCommand produces a new publication only when it settles within the bounded timeout — while offline responses project from the synchronously built / cached snapshot (published_version: 0). The full snapshot v1 wire payload carries no published_version field, so there is no client-verifiable cross-request equality guarantee; within a single live read the row is identical in shape and content to the matching snapshot.rows[] element. This payload never contains a full rows array.

refresh_status.description: ok = offline (synchronously built / cached row, no command) or a live worker command that completed a publication with no per-source warnings; partial = a live worker command completed a publication but at least one source emitted a warnings entry; timeout = this request produced no new publication, so the (live) row is the previously published (last-good) state — the causes are deliberately not enumerated (worker absence or command failure included, not only deadline expiry); see warnings for diagnostics.

row.description: A single element projected from PublishedState.rows_by_symbol, identical in shape to a snapshot.rows[] element. There is never a rows array on this payload.
